project_type: Next.js App Router web application - Music Search & Discovery using iTunes Search API
build_system: npm with Next.js 16.2.4. AGENTS.md warns that this version may have breaking changes vs training data - docs are in node_modules/next/dist/docs/
test_framework: No test framework installed yet. Linting via ESLint with eslint-config-next.
build_command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && cd /projects/sandbox/kiro-web-musicsearch && npm run build
test_command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && cd /projects/sandbox/kiro-web-musicsearch && npm run lint
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run lint to check for linting errors. 2. Run npm run build to confirm production build succeeds. 3. Verify all pages are generated without errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode - full access to npm registry and iTunes API. Node.js v22.22.3 via nvm (must source nvm.sh before using node/npm). No test framework installed - only lint and build available for verification.
contribution_requirements: Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes. Use Semantic HTML for all layout sections. Follow Next.js App Router best practices. Read node_modules/next/dist/docs/ for API guidance as version 16.2.4 may differ from training data.
key_patterns: - App Router with app/ directory. Path alias @/* maps to project root. Tailwind v4 with @import 'tailwindcss' in globals.css and @theme inline block for custom properties. PostCSS with @tailwindcss/postcss plugin. Geist font family loaded via next/font/google. Dark mode support via prefers-color-scheme media query. ESLint flat config with eslint-config-next core-web-vitals and typescript configs.
directory_structure: app/ - App Router pages and layouts. public/ - static assets. Top-level config: next.config.ts, tsconfig.json, package.json, postcss.config.mjs, eslint.config.mjs
